title: Lake Boats
content:
And under the shadows of cliffs of brick
    The lake boats
    Huddled like swans
    Turn and sigh like sleepers
    They are longing for the Spring!
meaning:
Edgar Lee Masters's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Lake Boats"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
